languages.text: {n}Все они в хорошей форме, что не удивительно. Молодые и седые, мужчины и женщины — каждый из них словно бы сошел с пропагандистских плакатов Астра Милитарум.{/n}
{n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Все они в хорошей форме, что не удивительно. Молодые и седые, мужчины и женщины — каждый из них словно бы сошел с пропагандистских плакатов Астра Милитарум.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼らは皆、健康で強靭な体をしている。それは当然のことである。若者も年寄りも、男も女も、皆がアストラ・ミリタラムの宣伝ポスターから飛び出してきたかのような姿をしている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zinde ve güçlü olmalarına şaşırmıyorsun. Genci yaşlısı, erkeği kadını derken hepsi, sanki bir Astra Militarum propaganda afişinden fırlamış gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zinde ve güçlü olmalarına şaşırmıyorsun. Genci yaşlısı, erkeği kadını derken hepsi, sanki bir Astra Militarum propaganda afişinden fırlamış gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}他们个个精壮有力，这并不意外。无论男女老少，人人都像是从星界军宣传海报里走出来的人。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}他们个个精壮有力，这并不意外。无论男女老少，人人都像是从星界军宣传海报里走出来的人。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sie sind allesamt fit und stark, was nicht weiter überraschend ist. Egal, ob jung oder alt, Mann oder Frau ... jeder Einzelne von ihnen scheint einem Propagandaplakat des Astra Militarum entsprungen zu sein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sie sind allesamt fit und stark, was nicht weiter überraschend ist. Egal, ob jung oder alt, Mann oder Frau ... jeder Einzelne von ihnen scheint einem Propagandaplakat des Astra Militarum entsprungen zu sein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sans surprise, chacun d'entre eux vous fait penser à une boule de muscles en puissance. Jeunes, vieux, hommes, femmes, tous semblent sortir tout droit d'une affiche de propagande de l'Astra Militarum.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}They are all fit and strong, which is not surprising. Young and old, male and female, every one of them looks like they stepped straight out of an Astra Militarum propaganda poster.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sans surprise, chacun d'entre eux vous fait penser à une boule de muscles en puissance. Jeunes, vieux, hommes, femmes, tous semblent sortir tout droit d'une affiche de propagande de l'Astra Militarum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Todos están en forma y son fuertes, lo que no te sorprende. Jóvenes y viejos, hombres y mujeres, todos parecen haber salido de un póster de reclutamiento del Astra Militarum.{/n}
